EXPLANATION: The cited reference refers to the Llama 3.2 1B model, which is a real software/model resource provided by Meta. The cited URL correctly resolves to the official Hugging Face repository for this model, and the metadata mismatch is a minor classification issue regarding the hosting platform versus the creator.

LINK: https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B
